temporal_description: The audio opens with a tense and suspenseful musical score, characterized by a low, pulsing electronic beat and a high-pitched, shimmering sound that creates a feeling of unease and anticipation. A medium shot shows an older man with graying hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket, sitting in a dimly lit room. He looks down with a somber expression. In the background, a dark wooden shelf holds a few white bowls. The on-screen text "风行网" is visible in the upper left corner. The man brings a phone to his ear, his expression remaining serious and focused. The camera cuts to a close-up of a younger man with dark hair, wearing a light blue collared shirt. He looks intently at a laptop screen just out of frame. He raises both hands to the back of his head, stretching or showing signs of stress. The "风行网" text remains in the upper left corner. The shot tightens on the younger man's face. He closes his eyes and grimaces, his face showing intense concentration or pain. The camera is very close, capturing the strain in his features. The "风行网" text is still present. The music gradually builds in intensity, becoming more dramatic and foreboding, as if leading up to a significant or stressful event. There is no dialogue or other sound effects, allowing the atmospheric music to dominate the soundscape.
